## Thoughts
- Interests:
  - universality -> quantum chaos [A Field Theory Approach to Universality in Quantum Chaos](https://kups.ub.uni-koeln.de/1947/1/main.pdf)
  - phase transitions 
  - how non-linear systems develope
- I have a lot of literature that I want to learn
  - I have no goal though where I want to go, or what interests me
  -    
- I am missing an interesting model that I 
-
